summary: Frontend-only mobile responsiveness verification on public preview URL. All 6 acceptance criteria PASS on mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports with no regressions.

desktop_1920x800.product_actions_visible: PASS (Add to cart + View detail buttons)

action_items: No action items. All requested fixes verified working on the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.jsx has been refactored cleanly: mobile uses aspect-square + compact 'Add' button; desktop uses aspect-[4/5] + full action row via md: variants. md:h-full only applied at md+ so mobile cards no longer stretch and create empty space.
Layout.jsx mobile-category-select uses navigate() on change; aria/options correctly map to /shop?category= URLs (note: 'Grillz' label maps to category=Grills, matching backend taxonomy).
HomePage hero wrapper uses aspect-[4/5] sm:aspect-[16/10] with object-cover video - confirmed video element renders within rounded-[38px] frame on 390px viewport.
feature-grid-cards and homepage-live-products-grid both use grid-cols-2 with md:gap-6 - 2-column mobile layout matches shop page behavior for visual consistency.

Minor observation (not blocking): native <video controls> attribute on hero shows browser default controls on mobile which may not match the cinematic look; consider custom controls or controls={false} if desired (no functional impact).
seed_data_creation: None - used live Shopify-backed catalog (42 products).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated via Playwright on https://spark-mobile-fix.preview.emergentagent.com at 390x844 and 1920x800. All 6 acceptance criteria (mobile shop 2-col square cards with small Add button and no trailing gap, mobile category <select> nav, mobile hero video fits 4/5 frame, mobile Signature categories 2-col square, mobile Latest arrivals 2-col square, desktop 4-col with full premium card and horizontal category bar) PASS. Live shopify catalog returned 42 products.
